sys_update_xml.name: sys_ux_macroponent_9244c5cf2f1101108f98136a2799b69b
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ux_macroponent"><sys_ux_macroponent action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><associated_types/><category>page</category><component_dependencies/><composition>[ ]</composition><da_relay_models/><data>[ ]</data><dispatched_events/><extends display_value="Dashboard Template">33f0d274b7321010f1feb81cde11a969</extends><handled_events/><interactions/><interfaces/><internal_event_mappings>{ }</internal_event_mappings><layout/><macroponent_dependencies/><name>Update Set Mover Informations</name><props>[ ]</props><required_translations>[ ]</required_translations><root_component/><root_component_config/><root_component_definition/><schema_version>1.0.0</schema_version><state_properties>[ ]</state_properties><sys_class_name>sys_ux_macroponent</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2022-01-31 11:41:41</sys_created_on><sys_id>9244c5cf2f1101108f98136a2799b69b</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Update Set Mover Informations</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ux_macroponent_9244c5cf2f1101108f98136a2799b69b</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2022-01-31 11:41:41</sys_updated_on></sys_ux_macroponent></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_d07011582f0001108f98136a2799b6cd
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>global.UpdateSetAjaxGlobal</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>true</client_callable><description>Various ajax functions for update sets
Update Set Mover</description><name>UpdateSetAjaxGlobal</name><script><![CDATA[var UpdateSetAjaxGlobal = Class.create();

UpdateSetAjaxGlobal.prototype = Object.extendsObject(AbstractAjaxProcessor, {
    //Update Set Mover changes
    setUpdateSetStateAfterCommitted: function(record) {
        var updateSet = new GlideRecord('sys_update_set');
        updateSet.get(record);
        updateSet.setValue('state', 'pending'); //pending = Pending Completion on this instance
        updateSet.setWorkflow(false);
        updateSet.update();
    },

    buildRecords: function() {
        //Build the Pending choice state for the sys_update_set table
        var choice = new GlideRecord('sys_choice');
        choice.initialize();
        choice.setValue('name', 'sys_update_set');
        choice.setValue('element', 'state');
        choice.setValue('language', 'en');
        choice.setValue('label', 'Pending Completion on This Instance');
        choice.setValue('value', 'pending');
        choice.setValue('sequence', 4);
        choice.insert();

        //Build the filed to mark the update sets to be ready for Prod
        var field = new GlideRecord('sys_dictionary');
        field.initialize();
        field.setValue('name', 'sys_update_set');
        field.setValue('internal_type', 'boolean');
        field.setValue('column_label', 'Ready to move to prod?');
        field.setValue('element', 'u_ready_to_move_to_prod');
        field.insert();

        //Build the field Complete on Prod
        var field2 = new GlideRecord('sys_dictionary');
        field2.initialize();
        field2.setValue('name', 'sys_update_set');
        field2.setValue('internal_type', 'boolean');
        field2.setValue('column_label', 'Completed on Prod');
        field2.setValue('element', 'u_completed_on_prod');
        field2.setValue('read_only', 'true');
        field2.insert();

        //Build the Client Script OnLoad & OnChange based on the field Ready to move to prod?
        //Show options if US is commited on Prod
        var clientScript1 = new GlideRecord('sys_script_client');
        clientScript1.initialize();
        clientScript1.setValue('name', 'Show options if US is commited on Prod');
        clientScript1.setValue('isolate_script', 'false');
        clientScript1.setValue('applies_extended', 'false');
        clientScript1.setValue('active', 'true');
        clientScript1.setValue('description', 'On Load and On Change Client script based on "Ready to move to prod?" field');
        clientScript1.setValue('global', 'true');
        clientScript1.setValue('type', 'onChange');
        clientScript1.setValue('script', "function onChange(control, oldValue, newValue, isLoading, isTemplate) {    var completeOnProd = g_form.getValue('u_completed_on_prod');    var readyToMoveToProd = 'u_ready_to_move_to_prod';    if (newValue == 'false' && completeOnProd == 'true') {        g_form.removeOption('state', 'pending');        g_form.setReadOnly(readyToMoveToProd, true);        return;    } else if (newValue == 'true' && completeOnProd == 'false') {        g_form.addOption('state', 'complete', 'Complete', 1);        g_form.setValue('state', 'complete');        return;    } else if (newValue == 'false' && completeOnProd == 'false') {        return;    }    if (newValue == 'false' && completeOnProd == 'true') {        g_form.addOption('state', 'complete', 'Complete', 1);        g_form.removeOption('state', 'pending');        g_form.setReadOnly(readyToMoveToProd, true);    } else if (newValue == 'true' && completeOnProd == 'false') {        g_form.addOption('state', 'complete', 'Complete', 1);        g_form.addOption('state', 'pending', 'Pending Completion on This Instance', 4);        g_form.setValue('state', 'complete');    } else if (newValue == 'false' && completeOnProd == 'false') {        g_form.removeOption('state', 'complete');        g_form.setValue('state', 'pending');    }}");
        clientScript1.setValue('ui_type', '10');
        clientScript1.setValue('field', 'u_ready_to_move_to_prod');
        clientScript1.setValue('sys_scope', 'global');
        clientScript1.setValue('order', '100');
        clientScript1.setValue('table', 'sys_update_set');
        clientScript1.insert();

        //Build the Client Script OnLoad & OnChange based on the field Ready to move to prod?
        //Update Set Mover State Options
        var clientScript2 = new GlideRecord('sys_script_client');
        clientScript2.initialize();
        clientScript2.setValue('name', 'Update Set Mover State Options');
        clientScript2.setValue('isolate_script', 'true');
        clientScript2.setValue('applies_extended', 'true');
        clientScript2.setValue('active', 'true');
        clientScript2.setValue('description', 'Update Set Mover State Options depending on the instance options configurations from the Update Set Mover application.');
        clientScript2.setValue('global', 'true');
        clientScript2.setValue('type', 'onLoad');
        clientScript2.setValue('script', "function onLoad() {    var ajaxGetState = new GlideAjax('x_661539_update_0.updateSetMoverUtils');    ajaxGetState.addParam('sysparm_name', 'getCurrentInstanceValue');    ajaxGetState.getXML(myCallBack);}function myCallBack(response) {    var readyForProd = g_form.getValue('u_ready_to_move_to_prod');    var completeOnProd = g_form.getValue('u_completed_on_prod');    var readyToMoveToProd = 'u_ready_to_move_to_prod';    var completeOnProdField = 'u_completed_on_prod';	    var res = response.responseXML.documentElement.getAttribute('answer');    var finalRes = JSON.parse(res);    if (finalRes.type != 'Production' && finalRes.last == 'true' && readyForProd == 'false' && completeOnProd == 'false') {        g_form.removeOption('state', 'complete');    } else if (finalRes.type == 'Production' || finalRes.last == 'false') {        g_form.removeOption('state', 'pending');        g_form.setDisplay(readyToMoveToProd, false);        g_form.setDisplay(completeOnProdField, false);    }}");
        clientScript2.setValue('ui_type', '10');
        clientScript2.setValue('field', 'application');
        clientScript2.setValue('order', '50');
        clientScript2.setValue('sys_scope', 'global');
        clientScript2.setValue('table', 'sys_update_set');
        clientScript2.insert();

        //Build List UI Action
        var uiAction = new GlideRecord('sys_ui_action');
        uiAction.initialize();
        uiAction.setValue('list_button', 'false');
        uiAction.setValue('client_script_v2', 'false');
        uiAction.setValue('ui11_compatible', 'true');
        uiAction.setValue('form_context_menu', 'false');
        uiAction.setValue('list_context_menu', 'false');
        uiAction.setValue('list_choice', 'true');
        uiAction.setValue('form_link', 'false');
        uiAction.setValue('show_update', 'true');
        uiAction.setValue('form_style', '');
        uiAction.setValue('action_name', 'listMarkReady');
        uiAction.setValue('client', 'true');
        uiAction.setValue('form_menu_button_v2', 'false');
        uiAction.setValue('sys_scope', 'global');
        uiAction.setValue('table', 'sys_update_set');
        uiAction.setValue('order', '100');
        uiAction.setValue('list_banner_button', 'false');
        uiAction.setValue('onclick', 'listMarkReady();');
        uiAction.setValue('active', 'true');
        uiAction.setValue('sys_overrides', '');
        uiAction.setValue('ui16_compatible', 'true');
        uiAction.setValue('script', "function listMarkReady() { var list = GlideList2.get('sys_update_set'); var keyset = list.getChecked(); var answer = confirm('Do you confirm you want to mark these update sets to be ready to move to prod?''); if (answer == true) { keyset.split(',').forEach(function(record) { markSelected(record); }); location.reload(true); } else { return false; } } function markSelected(record){ var updateSet = new GlideRecord('sys_update_set'); updateSet.get(record); updateSet.setValue('u_ready_to_move_to_prod', true); updateSet.setValue('state', 'complete'); updateSet.update();}");
        uiAction.setValue('form_button', 'false');
        uiAction.setValue('show_insert', 'true');
        uiAction.setValue('condition', 'new global.UpdateSetAjaxGlobal().checkIfLastInstanceBeforeProd();');
        uiAction.setValue('form_button_v2', 'false');
        uiAction.setValue('name', 'Mark Update Sets As Ready to Go to Prod');
        uiAction.setValue('list_link', 'false');
        uiAction.setValue('list_style', '');
        uiAction.insert();

    },

    deleteRecords: function() {
        var choice = new GlideRecord('sys_choice');
        choice.addQuery('element', 'state');
        choice.addQuery('name', 'sys_update_set');
        choice.addQuery('value', 'pending');
        choice.addQuery('label', 'Pending Completion on This Instance');
        choice.query();

        if (choice.next()) {
            choice.deleteRecord();
        }

        var field = new GlideRecord('sys_dictionary');
        field.addQuery('name', 'sys_update_set');
        field.addQuery('column_label', 'Ready to move to prod?');
        field.addQuery('element', 'u_ready_to_move_to_prod');
        field.query();

        if (field.next()) {
            field.deleteRecord();
        }

        var field2 = new GlideRecord('sys_dictionary');
        field2.addQuery('name', 'sys_update_set');
        field2.addQuery('column_label', 'Completed on Prod');
        field2.addQuery('element', 'u_completed_on_prod');
        field2.query();

        if (field2.next()) {
            field2.deleteRecord();
        }

        var clientScript1 = new GlideRecord('sys_script_client');
        clientScript1.addQuery('name', 'Update Set Mover State Options');
        clientScript1.addQuery('table', 'sys_update_set');
        clientScript1.query();

        if (clientScript1.next()) {
            clientScript1.deleteRecord();
        }

        var clientScript2 = new GlideRecord('sys_script_client');
        clientScript2.addQuery('name', 'Show options if US is commited on Prod');
        clientScript2.addQuery('table', 'sys_update_set');
        clientScript2.query();

        if (clientScript2.next()) {
            clientScript2.deleteRecord();
        }

        var uiAction = new GlideRecord('sys_ui_action');
        uiAction.addQuery('name', 'Mark Update Sets As Ready to Go to Prod');
        uiAction.addQuery('action_name', 'listMarkReady');
        uiAction.query();

        if (uiAction.next()) {
            uiAction.deleteRecord();
        }
    },

    setReadyForProdFalseGlobal: function(sysID) {
        try {
            var updateSet = new GlideRecord('sys_update_set');
            updateSet.addQuery('origin_sys_id', sysID);
            updateSet.query();

            if (updateSet.next()) {
                updateSet.setValue('u_ready_to_move_to_prod', false);
                updateSet.setValue('u_completed_on_prod', true);
                updateSet.setValue('state', 'complete');
                updateSet.update();
            } else {
                gs.log('setReadyForProdFalseGlobal try error, no update set found');
            }

        } catch (e) {
            gs.log('setReadyForProdFalse Error: ' + e, 'UpdateSetAjaxGlobal');

        }
    },

    checkIfLastInstanceBeforeProd: function() {
        var currentInstance = gs.getProperty('instance_name');
        var instanceTable = new GlideRecord('x_661539_update_0_instances');
        instanceTable.addQuery('last_instance_before_prod', true);
        instanceTable.query();
        if (instanceTable.next()) {
            return instanceTable.name == currentInstance ? true : false;
        }
    },

    type: "UpdateSetAjaxGlobal"
});]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2021-11-21 20:13:00</sys_created_on><sys_id>d07011582f0001108f98136a2799b6cd</sys_id><sys_mod_count>67</sys_mod_count><sys_name>UpdateSetAjaxGlobal</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_d07011582f0001108f98136a2799b6cd</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2022-02-22 19:14:10</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>

remote_update_set.display_value: Update Set Mover - Global Update Set v2

action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><element>parent</element><position>3</position><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2021-12-10 08:48:04</sys_created_on><sys_id>4ce9e8162f9041108f98136a2799b6fd</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_ui_formatter/><sys_ui_section caption="NULL" display_value="" name="sys_update_set" action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><element>release_date</element><position>4</position><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2021-12-10
